commands.review_summary:
The branch changes Control UI tool-card extraction to prefer exact IDs and pair nameless same-name tool results FIFO, with regression tests for sequential and empty-result cases.

PR surface: Source +16, Tests +74. Total +90 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main's reverse scan can mispair call, call, result, result for nameless same-name tools, and the PR adds that exact regression shape. I did not run a live browser reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining action is contributor proof handling and maintainer review, not a code repair that an automated worker should replace on the PR branch.

target.title: fix(ui): fix tool result pairing for sequential same-name tool calls
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #70746 by pairing Control UI tool results with the correct tool card when multiple nameless tool calls share the same name.

## Root Cause

`findLatestCard` scanned newest-to-oldest and used `outputText` as the fallback unmatched marker. With sequential same-name calls such as `read`, `read`, result A, result B, the first result could attach to the later call. Empty first results also needed a separate matched marker so the fallback matcher would not reuse the first card.

## Fix

- Prefer exact tool-call ID matches across all cards.
- For nameless same-name fallback, scan oldest-to-newest and pair with the earliest card that has not already consumed a fallback result.
- Track fallback result attachment separately from rendered `outputText`, so empty results still count as consumed.
- Add focused regression coverage for sequential nameless same-name calls and empty-result pairing.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/chat/tool-cards.node.test.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main --parallel-tests "node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/chat/tool-cards.node.test.ts"`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Control UI tool-card extraction now attaches sequential nameless same-name tool results to the corresponding expanded tool card instead of swapping or dropping visible output.

Real environment tested: local OpenClaw UI Vitest harness against PR head `e90a88ecede6ce0db2fce04ce49026baa7ebb972`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/chat/tool-cards.node.test.ts`.

Evidence after fix: the focused test file now covers `tool_use`, `tool_use`, `tool_result`, `tool_result` ordering for same-name nameless calls, plus the empty first-result case that keeps `outputText` falsy.

Observed result after fix: 1 test file passed, 13 tests passed; autoreview reran the same test command and reported no accepted/actionable findings.

What was not tested: no browser screenshot was captured; this patch is in the pure tool-card extraction path that feeds the expanded Control UI renderer.
